slots.notes: Full-screen hero background. A clean, modern, green and white background. A vibrant, sustainable-energy themed background with a soft gradient. No people, no text. Native placeholder is a green gradient background; replace with brand-specific gradient/color. Fills the entire page - full-width, full-vheight.

The brand logo at the top-left of the hero. About 48px. It is an inline SVG icon or group-ic. Note: your brand logo gets the 'fg' text color - not a separate brand color. Native placeholder is a stylized circular shape or an icon of a sun/eco element

The primary CTA button - it reads something like 'Get A Quote' or 'Switch to Solar'. It's a rounded button with bg and text-accent in the same green. This is running text - no data backend needed. A simple button with hover: opacity 0.9. Border-radius: 8px. Note: text-accent-color.

Three text fields: a

heading

,

body

, and a subtext/disclaimer. Each one is in its own card or section. The heading is the most prominent - something like 'Power Your Home with Sun' - now updated version. The body is a short paragraph. The subtext could be a date, a disclaimer, an expiration. These are running text - they are for you to fill in. No data backend. The heading is the most prominent - large, font-bold, tracking-tight. The body is smaller, more contrast. The subtext is the smallest. Note: bolder plate. Supply dummy text that reads well - brand will replace.

mechanic: A full-page hero with green background, logo, headline, body, subtext, and CTA button. Left-text, right-image layout with full-width bg. Framer Motion useInView for entry.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3 as arbitrary values. Framer Motion v12 + for scroll-triggered animation. Icons from lucide-react.
reskinNotes: This is a blank slate for a solar company. Every text blend is hardcoded as dummy copy - Brand, Hero (CTA, Title, Subtitle, Body) - there is no CS/backend. The fonts and color scheme are not tokens or variables - you are responsible for changing them. The assets (logo, background) are for you to replace with your brand's. The color scheme is in - you can change.
